success_page_wiring._comment: Asserts the success pages forward Stripe's resolve_token to /select-runtime (POST body) and /resolve-claim (GET query). If any of these disappear from the shipped HTML, /select-runtime silently depends on the SELECT_RUNTIME_ALLOW_UNTOKENED escape hatch and /resolve-claim fails 400 — breaking the Telegram claim-code handoff.

forbidden_substrings: body: JSON.stringify({ session_id: sessionId, runtime_type: selectedRuntime })
body: JSON.stringify({ session_id: sessionId, runtime_type: selectedRuntime })

api_assertions._comment: Verifies the server side still enforces resolve_token. Warn-only on /select-runtime while SELECT_RUNTIME_ALLOW_UNTOKENED is still set on Blue.
